steps.title: Write the obtuse angle
steps.content:
An obtuse angle is supplementary to an acute angle:
$$
180-(8x-620)
$$

steps.title: Add the requested angles
steps.content:
The requested sum is one acute angle plus three obtuse angles:
$$
(8x-620)+3(180-(8x-620))
$$

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content: Simplify the expression: $$ (8x-620)+3(180-8x+620) $$ $$ 8x-620+2{,}400-24x $$ $$ -16x+1{,}780 $$ The answer is 1780.
